original_image_tags: A scanned, aged, typed memorandum on gray paper. Two hole-punch circles are visible at the top center. A blue "DECLASSIFIED" stamp is in the upper right. A purple "CONFIDENTIAL" stamp, crossed out, is visible above the subject line. The document is covered with various handwritten notes, stamps, and filing numbers in different ink colors.

elements.description: A typewritten U.S. government memorandum dated 7/19/50, addressed to the Director, FBI, from SAC, Albuquerque, subject 'SUMMARY OF AERIAL PHENOMENA IN NEW MEXICO INFORMATION CONCERNING'. The page contains handwritten annotations including 'Flying discs' in cursive, 'S-1 = Air Force' in blue ink, and various routing numbers. There are multiple 'CONFIDENTIAL' stamps in red, a 'DECLASSIFIED' label with 'Authority: NND 90986', and a 'NOT RECORDED' stamp dated 53 JUL 27 1950. The document also includes typed administrative text and various filing notations.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual elements (typed memorandum, stamps, handwritten notes) and categories, but B adds specific details about stamps and text that A omits without contradiction.
